tracing a sigil in candle soot across her own collarbone with one fingertip
glancing sharply over her shoulder with a half-smirk catching someone watching
whispering an incantation with her eyes half-closed and lips barely moving
tilting her chin down and staring up through dark lashes directly at viewer
cupping a glowing orb between her palms with violet light illuminating her face
running her tongue slowly across her lower lip while never breaking eye contact
pushing open a heavy iron door with one hand extended into darkness
drawing a tarot card and smirking at what the reading reveals
letting cold rain stream down her upturned face with eyes peacefully closed
pressing her palm flat against a stone wall leaning close to it
blowing out a ritual candle with smoke curling sensually past her cheekbone
tucking a black rose behind her ear while watching something just out of frame
dragging her fingertip through melted wax pooled on her bare shoulder
narrowing her eyes at the camera like she knows your secret
standing in a doorway backlit by flickering candlelight casting her in silhouette
exhaling visible breath into freezing air while staring straight ahead unflinching
adjusting a silver ring on her finger with slow deliberate twisting motion
catching the viewer's gaze and holding it without blinking or smiling
pulling her hood back letting dark hair spill freely across her shoulders
touching the hollow of her own throat with two fingertips almost ritualistically
turning her head sharply as if hearing something no one else can
leaning back against a stone column with her head tilted and eyes closed
tracing arcane symbols in frost on a windowpane with one black nail
lifting a ritual blade to candlelight examining its edge with dangerous fascination
holding a raven's feather to her lips while whispering something forbidden
